urdu transliteration text: Aye raat na dhalna ke ujad jayegi Zainab
english translation text: O night do not fade, Zainab will be destroyed

urdu transliteration text: Bhai se dame subh bichar jayegi Zainab
english translation text: Zainab will be torn away from her brother at dawn

urdu transliteration text: Sone de Sakina ko ke phir so na sakegi
english translation text: Let Sakina sleep she will not be be able to sleep later

urdu transliteration text: Rona bhi jo chahegi to phir ro na sakegi
english translation text: even if she wants to she will not be allowed to cry

urdu transliteration text:
Asghar se mulaqat to phir ho na sakegi
She will never see Asghar again
Aye raat na dhalna ke ujad jayegi Zainab
english translation text: O night do not fade, Zainab will be destroyed

urdu transliteration text:
Ghabrae huwe laal hai sahmi hui maayain
Children are anxious, mothers are disillusioned

Jee bhar ke main de loo Ali Akbar ko duae
Let me give heartfelt duas to Ali Akbar
Lena hai abhi Auno- Mohammad ki balaye
english translation text: I have yet to accept the calamity of Aun and Muhammad

urdu transliteration text: Aye raat na dhalna ke ujad jayegi Zainab
english translation text: O night do not fade, Zainab will be destroyed

urdu transliteration text:
Har chand se bachon ki abhi pyas hai baqi
The innocent children are still thirsty

Kuch ankh me hasrat to kuch aas hai baqi
The eyes still wish and hope (for water) remains
Lekin mera bhai mera Bhai Mera Abbas hai baqi
english translation text: Because my brother Abbas is still alive

urdu transliteration text: Aye raat na dhalna ke ujad jayegi Zainab
english translation text: O night do not fade, Zainab will be destroyed

urdu transliteration text: Aye raat bikhar tere bas me hai jaha tak
english translation text: O night scatter away as far as you can

urdu transliteration text: Mit jaaye kal ale Paymabar ke Nishan tak
english translation text: (for) Tomorrow all signs of the Prophet will be wiped off

urdu transliteration text:
Baqi hai ye manzar Ali Akbar ki Azaan tak
This scene will only remain till Ali Akbar's adhaan
Aye raat na dhalna ke ujad jayegi Zainab
english translation text: O night do not fade, Zainab will be destroyed

urdu transliteration text:
Baqi hai abhi aale Mohammad ka safina
The ship of Ahle Bait(Hussain) is still alive
Beti ko sulane ka hai Shabbir ka sina
english translation text: Shabbir's bosom is still there for Sakina to rest

urdu transliteration text:
Jhoola Ali Asghar ka jhulati hai Sakina
Sakina is rocking Ali Asghar's cradle
Aye raat na dhalna ke ujad jayegi Zainab
english translation text: O night do not fade, Zainab will be destroyed

urdu transliteration text: Kal kaun sunega ye meri aaho buka bhi
english translation text: Who will listen to my pain and lament tomorrow

urdu transliteration text: Hoga tahe khanjar mere bhai ka gala bhi
english translation text: My brother's throat will be on the edge of the sword

urdu transliteration text: Khaima to kuja sar pe na hogi ye rida bhi
english translation text: The tents will be gone and my hijab too

urdu transliteration text: Aye raat na dhalna ke ujad jayegi Zainab
english translation text: O night do not fade, Zainab will be destroyed

urdu transliteration text: Aye raat ghari bhar ko to rahne de sukoon main
english translation text: O night leave us in peace for a while

urdu transliteration text: Ghir jayenge nasir mere aada ki safon meen
english translation text: My helpers will be surrounded by the ranks of the enemy

urdu transliteration text: Ye Chand se chehre to naha jayenge khoon meen
english translation text: Their innocent faces will be drenched in blood

urdu transliteration text: Aye raat na dhalna ke ujad jayegi Zainab
english translation text: O night do not fade, Zainab will be destroyed
